title: Shingeki no Craft - Vanilla Attack [Frozen]]
description: Resource pack for the "Shingeki no Craft" mod - all textures and models in a style close to vanilla minecraft.
body:
## Resource pack for the "[Shingeki no Craft](https://modrinth.com/datapack/shingeki-no-craft)" mod - all textures and models in a style close to vanilla minecraft.



![Snc Vanilla Attack Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1be55f797cc1523dbf7fa4390ed22deb277a3bfb.jpeg)
## Redesign versions of the Scout uniform and ODM 
![Uniform and ODM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d136fdd1dab8f5559f30fb9839ff77136c77ee85.png)
## Redesign versions of the drink's and weapon
![drink's and weapon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c80f78d4e8ca8acf54a333b6c0ad017c9bbf8ea.png)
## Remodel signal flare 
![Signal flare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f48fc349b1e7b5ffd1a27e2867a3b8457705a91.png)
